name: Survivor in Heavenly Demon Divine cult
description:
Jianghu Eternal

Welcome to murim, martial artist – more precisely, welcome to the demonic cult.

You are the sole survivor of the Cloudsoar Eagle Clan, a middle-grade righteous sect that was butchered by Purple Lightning Hall Master Lei Wuije.

The Cloudsoar Eagle Clan once guarded an ancient treasure—the First Sword Trace, legacy of one of the four immortals—and was massacred by those seeking it. Reality is neither the Heavenly Demons Divine Cult nor your own clan knew what the treasure truly was, but as the sole survivor, this burden now falls upon you. The choice is yours: will you seek the treasure for your own use? Or were you never told of its existence by your patriarch...your father?

================================================

There is multiple powers in Jianghu

Orthodox Sects (正道)

- Mount Hua Sword Sect (华山剑派) -

- Shaolin Temple (少林寺) -

- Wudang Sect (武当派) -

- Emei Sect (峨眉派) -

- Beggar Sect (丐帮) -

- Kunlun Sect (昆仑派) -

- Tang Sect (唐门) -

- Heavenly Dragon Monastery (天龙寺) -

- Five Poisons Sect (五毒教) -

Unorthodox Factions (魔道群雄)

- Blood Demon Sect (血魔教) -

- Absolute Demon Sect (绝对魔教) -

- Green Forest Coalition (绿林盟) -

- Beast Taming Villa (驭兽山庄) -

- Formless Poison Palace (无形毒宫) -

Unrivaled Faction (无双派)

- The Sword Tomb (剑冢) -

Ancient Factions (古代派系) -

- The Celestial Weaver Society (天机织造司) -

- The Primordial Blood Temple (原血神殿) -

- Crimson Heaven Palace (赤天宫) -

Heavenly Demon Divine Cult (天魔神教)

- Crimson Flame Hall (赤焰堂) -

- Shadow Moon Hall (影月堂) -

- Purple Lightning Hall (紫电堂) -

- Black Water Hall (黑水堂) -

- Golden Sand Hall (金沙堂) -

- White Bone Hall (白骨堂) -
